method: Firecrawl search+scrape of benchmark URLs; quivly.ai landing scrape; internal arena-discovery.json

The tool that wakes you up... breaks.

extractedPattern: One primary input (PagerTron: spacebar; Wizlympics: collect/avoid; Toggl: Okay/Nope)
Product metaphor obvious quickly (pager duty, real vs fake cloud, $1B valuation)
Score tied to business metaphor (high score DB, 10 pts / 500 swag, valuation $)
Embeddable browser experience — no download mentioned on benchmark pages
Replay + share (leaderboard, try again, share score)
